questionText: Provide the highest senior management-level positions or committees with responsibility for environmental issues (do not include the names of individuals).
questionKo: 환경이슈에 대한 책임을 가진 가장 높은 수준의 관리자의 직책 또는 위원회를 입력하십시오 ( 개인의 이름을 입력하지 마십시오 ).

sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: While it is most important for a member of the board to have accountability over environmental issues, assigning management-level responsibility indicates that the organization is committed to implementing its environmental policy.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to column 1 "Management-level responsibility for this environmental issue" of 4.3.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Yes" in response to 열 1 "관리-level responsibility for this environmental issue" of 4.3.

guidance.text:
General 
If there is more than one senior position/committee with management-level responsibility for the environmental issue, provide details on the highest senior position or committee with management-level responsibility for environmental issues.
If you would like to describe more than one senior position/committee with management-level responsibility for the environmental issue you may use the "Add Row" button. This is optional. In this case, ensure that the position/committee with the highest level of responsibility is in the top row of the table.
Note that this question asks about the position and not about the names of the staff holding these positions. Do not include the name of any individual or any other personal data in your response .
Coverage of responsibility (column 3) 
This column only appears if "Assessing future trends in environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities" or "Assessing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities" or "Managing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities" is selected in column 2 "Environmental responsibilities of this position".
This column seeks to understand whether the highest management-level position or committee with responsibility for environmental issues considers both environmental risks and opportunities related to both your own operations and core financing activities.
Reporting line (column 4) 
Select the option that represents the direct reporting line of the position of individual or committee with responsibility for environmental issues (i.e., the position with direct oversight of the individual or committee with responsibility).
Only select "Reports to the board directly" if the reporting line is to the board (e.g., via Board Chair). This also applies when the reporting line is to a C-suite Officer that is also part of your organization's board.
Frequency of reporting to the board on environmental issues (column 5) 
Select the most regular frequency that the individual or committee reports to the board. For example, if the individual or committee reports to the board quarterly but may also report to the board in between these regular meetings as important matters arise, you should select "Quarterly".
If your organization has an equivalent governing body rather than a board which you have reported in 4.1, respond based on the equivalent governing body.
Please explain (column 6) 
Provide a brief description of the organizational structure associated with the position/committee selected in column 1.
State the controls and procedures by which the position/committee assesses and manages environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and opportunities, including:
procedures followed to inform the position/committee on environmental issues;
frequency the position/committee is informed on environmental issues; and
how the controls and procedures used to assess and manage environmental issues are integrated with other internal functions.
For Financial Services disclosers: If you selected "Dependencies, impacts, risks and opportunities related to our own operations and/or upstream value chain" in column 3 and the responsibility does not cover both your own operations and upstream value chain, please explain your exclusions.
guidance.textKo: 일반 만약 there is more than one senior position/위원회 with 관리-level responsibility 에 대한 environmental issue, 세부 정보를 입력 on the highest senior position 또는 위원회 with 관리-level responsibility for 환경 이슈. 만약 you would like to 설명 more than one senior position/위원회 with 관리-level responsibility 에 대한 environmental issue you may use the "Add 행" button. This is optional. In this case, ensure that the position/위원회 with the highest level of responsibility is in the top 행 의 table. Note that this 문항 asks about the position 및 not about the names 의 staff holding these positions. Do not include the name of 하나 이상 individual 또는 하나 이상 other personal data in your response. Coverage of responsibility (열 3) This 열 only appears 만약 "Assessing future trends in 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회" 또는 "Assessing 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회" 또는 "Managing 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회" is 선택 in 열 2 "Environmental responsibilities of this position". This 열 seeks to understand whether the highest 관리-level position 또는 위원회 with responsibility for 환경 이슈 considers both environmental 리스크 및 기회 related to both your own operations 및 core financing activities. Reporting line (열 4) Select the option that represents the direct reporting line 의 position of individual 또는 위원회 with responsibility for 환경 이슈 (i.e., the position with direct oversight 의 individual 또는 위원회 with responsibility). Only select "Reports to the 이사회 directly" 만약 the reporting line is to the 이사회 (e.g., via 이사회 Chair). This also applies 경우 the reporting line is to a C-suite Officer that is also part of 귀사의 이사회. Frequency of reporting to the 이사회 on 환경 이슈 (열 5) Select the most regular frequency that the individual 또는 위원회 reports to the 이사회. For example, 만약 the individual 또는 위원회 reports to the 이사회 quarterly but may also report to the 이사회 in between these regular meetings as important matters arise, you 해야 합니다 select "Quarterly". 만약 귀사 has an equivalent governing body rather than a 이사회 which you have 보고 in 4.1, respond based on the equivalent governing body. Please explain (열 6) Provide a brief description 의 organizational structure associated with the position/위원회 선택 in 열 1. State the controls 및 절차s by which the position/위원회 assesses 및 manages 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및 기회, 포함: 절차s followed to inform the position/위원회 on 환경 이슈; frequency the position/위원회 is informed on 환경 이슈; 및 how the controls 및 절차s used to assess 및 manage 환경 이슈 are integrated with other internal functions. For 금융 서비스 disclosers: 만약 you 선택 "Dependencies, impacts, 리스크 및 기회 related to our own operations 및/또는 업스트림 가치사슬" in 열 3 및 the responsibility does not cover both your own operations 및 업스트림 가치사슬, please explain your 제외사항.

guidance.text:
The organization has senior management responsibility for the assessment and management of environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities.
These responsibilities are assigned to a particular role.
Senior management is informed about and monitors environmental issues, and the organization has a clear, transparent, and thorough process for doing so which includes whether, by whom, and how frequently management is informed.
Senior management has a direct reporting line to the board.
Senior management has responsibility for:
Environmental policies and commitments,
Setting and measuring progress (through performance metric tracking) against environmental targets,
Dedicated controls and procedures for the management of environmental issues, in particular with relation to the implementation of strategy, financial planning, and risk management policies.
guidance.textKo: The organization has senior 관리 책임 에 대한 assessment 및 관리 of 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회. These responsibilities are assigned to a particular role. 고위 경영진 is informed about 및 monitors 환경 이슈, 및 the organization has a clear, transparent, 및 thorough 프로세스 for doing so which includes whether, by whom, 및 how frequently 관리 is informed. 고위 경영진 has a direct reporting line to the 이사회. 고위 경영진 has responsibility for: Environmental policies 및 commitments, Setting 및 measuring progress (through performance metric tracking) against environmental 목표, Dedicated controls 및 절차s 에 대한 관리 of 환경 이슈, in particular with relation to the 이행 of 전략, 재무계획, 및 리스크 관리 policies.

guidance.text:
Highest management-level position or committee: the most senior individual or committee with operational responsibility for the implementation of decisions taken at the board level and day-to-day management. 
Reporting lines: structures within organizations that establish/describe the lines of communication between employees and their supervisors.
guidance.textKo: Highest 관리-level position 또는 위원회: the most senior individual 또는 위원회 with operational responsibility 에 대한 이행 of decisions taken at the 이사회 level 및 day-to-day 관리. Reporting lines: structures within organizations that establish/설명 the lines of communication between employees 및 their supervisors.

i) Any of the following options selected in column 'Position of individual or committee with responsibility' - 1 point

- 'President'
- 'General Counsel'

AND

AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Approving corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Monitoring compliance with corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring compliance with corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing value chain engagement related to environmental issues' OR ‘Managing engagement in landscapes and/or jurisdictions' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding value chain engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing supplier compliance with environmental requirements' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring supplier compliance with organizational requirements' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a business strategy which considers environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring the implementation of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing annual budgets related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding annual budgets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing environmental reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing priorities related to innovation/low environmental impact products or services (including R&D)' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding innovation/R&D priorities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

If 'Managing public policy engagement related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding public policy engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Assessing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Assessing future trends in environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Managing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Reviewing and guiding the assessment process for dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing the business strategy related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Monitoring the implementation of the business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing major capital and/or operational expenditures relating to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding major capital expenditures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental targets' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing the setting of corporate targets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Providing employee incentives related to environmental performance' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Approving and/or overseeing employee incentives' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Conducting environmental scenario analysis' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding scenario analysis' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2.
AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Approving corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Monitoring compliance with corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring compliance with corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing value chain engagement related to environmental issues' OR ‘Managing engagement in landscapes and/or jurisdictions' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding value chain engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing supplier compliance with environmental requirements' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring supplier compliance with organizational requirements' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a business strategy which considers environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring the implementation of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing annual budgets related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding annual budgets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing environmental reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing priorities related to innovation/low environmental impact products or services (including R&D)' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding innovation/R&D priorities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

'기후변화' is 선택 in 문항 4.1.2 그리고 만약 'Assessing 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회' 또는 ‘Assessing future trends in 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회' 또는 ‘Managing 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회' 선택 in 열 'Environmental responsibilities...': criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 7/7 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
Full Awareness points awarded AND
Any option excluding 'Dependencies, impacts, risks and opportunities related to our own operations and/or upstream value chain' in column 'Coverage of responsibilities' AND
Any of the following options selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities of this position':
- 'Assessing future trends in environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities'
- 'Assessing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities'
- 'Managing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities'
i) Any of the following options selected in column 'Position of individual or committee with responsibility' - 1 point
- 'Chief Executive Officer (CEO)'
- 'Chief Financial Officer (CFO)'
- 'Chief Operating Officer (COO)'
- 'Chief Procurement Officer (CPO)'
- 'Chief Risks Officer (CRO)'
- 'Chief Sustainability Officer (CSO)'
- 'Chief Investment Officer (CIO)'
- 'Chief Credit Officer (CCO)'
- 'Chief Underwriting Officer (CUO)'
- 'Chief Government Relations Officer (CGRO)'
- 'Chief Technology Officer (CTO)'
- 'Chief Compliance Officer (CCO)'
- 'Other C-Suite Officer'
- 'President'
- 'General Counsel'
ii) Three or more options excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities of this position' - 1 point
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 'Environmental issue': The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to be 획득 가능 for 관리 점: 인지에서 최고점 획득 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'Dependencies, impacts, 리스크 및 기회 related to our own operations 및/또는 업스트림 가치사슬' in 열 'Coverage of responsibilities' 그리고 하나 이상 의 following options 선택 in 열 'Environmental responsibilities of this position': - 'Assessing future trends in 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회' - 'Assessing 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회' - 'Managing 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회' i) 하나 이상 의 following options 선택 in 열 'Position of individual 또는 위원회 with responsibility' - 1 점 - 'Chief Executive Officer (CEO)' - 'Chief Financial Officer (CFO)' - 'Chief Operating Officer (COO)' - 'Chief Procurement Officer (CPO)' - '최고리스크책임자(CRO)' - 'Chief Sustainability Officer (CSO)' - 'Chief Investment Officer (CIO)' - 'Chief Credit Officer (CCO)' - 'Chief Underwriting Officer (CUO)' - 'Chief Government Relations Officer (CGRO)' - 'Chief 기술 Officer (CTO)' - '최고준법책임자(CCO)' - 'Other C-Suite Officer' - 'President' - '일반 Counsel' ii) Three 또는 more options 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Environmental responsibilities of this position' - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 'Environmental issue' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다. One 행 scored.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Board of directors or equivalent governing body' in question 4.1.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Full Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
All of the following met (if applicable) - 1 point
If 'Managing public policy engagement related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding public policy engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Assessing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Assessing future trends in environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Managing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Reviewing and guiding the assessment process for dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing the business strategy related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Monitoring the implementation of the business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing major capital and/or operational expenditures relating to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding major capital expenditures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Measuring progress towards environmental corporate targets' OR ‘Measuring progress towards environmental science-based targets' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Monitoring progress towards corporate targets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental targets' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing the setting of corporate targets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Providing employee incentives related to environmental performance' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Approving and/or overseeing employee incentives' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Conducting environmental scenario analysis' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding scenario analysis' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2.
AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Approving corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Monitoring compliance with corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring compliance with corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing value chain engagement related to environmental issues' OR ‘Managing engagement in landscapes and/or jurisdictions' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding value chain engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing supplier compliance with environmental requirements' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring supplier compliance with organizational requirements' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...'in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a business strategy which considers environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...'in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring the implementation of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing annual budgets related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding annual budgets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing environmental reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing priorities related to innovation/low environmental impact products or services (including R&D)' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding innovation/R&D priorities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No' selected in column 'Board of directors or equivalent governing body' in question 4.1.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Full Management points awarded - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
One row scored.

AND
If 'Assessing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Assessing future trends in environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Managing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Reviewing and guiding the assessment process for dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

AND
If 'Managing acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

AND
If 'Providing employee incentives related to environmental performance' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Approving and/or overseeing employee incentives' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Approving corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Monitoring compliance with corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring compliance with corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing value chain engagement related to environmental issues' OR ‘Managing engagement in landscapes and/or jurisdictions' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding value chain engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing supplier compliance with environmental requirements' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring supplier compliance with organizational requirements' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a business strategy which considers environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring the implementation of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing annual budgets related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding annual budgets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing environmental reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing priorities related to innovation/low environmental impact products or services (including R&D)' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding innovation/R&D priorities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

i) Any of the following options selected in column 'Position of individual or committee with responsibility' - 1 point

A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.

If 'Managing public policy engagement related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding public policy engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Assessing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Assessing future trends in environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Managing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Reviewing and guiding the assessment process for dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

AND
If 'Managing acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing major capital and/or operational expenditures relating to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding major capital expenditures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND

AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental targets' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing the setting of corporate targets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Providing employee incentives related to environmental performance' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Approving and/or overseeing employee incentives' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Conducting environmental scenario analysis' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding scenario analysis' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2.
AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Approving corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Monitoring compliance with corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring compliance with corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing value chain engagement related to environmental issues' OR ‘Managing engagement in landscapes and/or jurisdictions' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding value chain engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing supplier compliance with environmental requirements' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring supplier compliance with organizational requirements' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a business strategy which considers environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring the implementation of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing annual budgets related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding annual budgets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing environmental reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing priorities related to innovation/low environmental impact products or services (including R&D)' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding innovation/R&D priorities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2

AND
If 'Managing value chain engagement related to environmental issues' OR ‘Managing engagement in landscapes and/or jurisdictions' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding value chain engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND

AND
If 'Developing a business strategy which considers environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND

AND

AND

AND
If 'Managing environmental reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND

ROUTE A)

If 'Managing public policy engagement related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding public policy engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Assessing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Assessing future trends in environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' OR ‘Managing environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Reviewing and guiding the assessment process for dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing the business strategy related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Monitoring the implementation of the business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing major capital and/or operational expenditures relating to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding major capital expenditures' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND

AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental targets' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing the setting of corporate targets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Providing employee incentives related to environmental performance' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Approving and/or overseeing employee incentives' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Conducting environmental scenario analysis' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': 'Overseeing and guiding scenario analysis' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2.
AND
If 'Setting corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Approving corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Monitoring compliance with corporate environmental policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring compliance with corporate policies and/or commitments' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing value chain engagement related to environmental issues' OR ‘Managing engagement in landscapes and/or jurisdictions' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding value chain engagement' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing supplier compliance with environmental requirements' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring supplier compliance with organizational requirements' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a business strategy which considers environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a business strategy' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Developing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing and guiding the development of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Implementing a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Monitoring the implementation of a climate transition plan' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing annual budgets related to environmental issues' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding annual budgets' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing environmental reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Overseeing reporting, audit, and verification processes' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
AND
If 'Managing priorities related to innovation/low environmental impact products or services (including R&D)' selected in column 'Environmental responsibilities...': ‘Reviewing and guiding innovation/R&D priorities' selected in column 'Governance mechanisms...' in a row where 'Climate change' is selected in question 4.1.2
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.

A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.

AND

AND

AND

AND
